longsword_001.name: Longsword
longsword_001.description: A classic versatile weapon. Does 1d8 slashing damage, or 1d10 if used with two hands.

plate_armor_001.name: Plate Armor
plate_armor_001.description: Plate consists of shaped, interlocking metal plates to cover the entire body. AC equals 18.

boots_of_speed_001.name: Boots of Speed
boots_of_speed_001.description: While you wear these boots, you can use a bonus action to click the heels together. Your walking speed is doubled.

ring_of_protection_001.name: Ring of Protection
ring_of_protection_001.description: You gain a +1 bonus to AC and saving throws while wearing this ring.

holy_avenger_001.name: Holy Avenger
holy_avenger_001.description: You gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a fiend or an undead, it takes an extra 2d10 radiant damage.
